name: callbell-dev
description: Code pack for callbell: a lazy senior developer who builds the simplest thing that works, plus the review, audit and debt skills that check it.

interface.shortDescription: The laziest code that actually works
interface.longDescription: Code pack for callbell. A lazy senior developer at three levels — lite, full, ultra — who asks whether a thing needs to exist before building it, reaches for the standard library and the platform before writing custom code, and leaves one runnable check behind. Four more skills review a diff, audit a repo, harvest deferred shortcuts, and show the measured impact. Requires the callbell core.
defaultPrompt: Build this the laziest way that works.
Audit this repo for what I can delete.
